name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., Latin America, and UK, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop chain with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need quick access to funds or wish to buy/sell merchandise. FirstCash operates in 29 U.S. states plus Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador), employing approximately 22,000 people across these regions. The company is publicly traded and listed in the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index.

FirstCash's core business model revolves around pawn lending—providing small, non-recourse loans secured by personal property pledges—and retail sales of diverse merchandise. They buy and sell jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Beyond pawn loans, FirstCash offers layaway services (10% down payment plans), gold/precious metal buying, and retail inventory sales. Through their subsidiary AFF, the company also provides lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide, though this is a secondary business line.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale and international footprint—operating more stores than virtually any competitor in the pawn industry. The company serves as a branded, corporate alternative to independent pawn shops, with standardized operations across all locations. Their "Find A Store" locator tool and published merchandise categories (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments) suggest transparent operations and customer convenience. The addition of layaway services and gold-buying programs provides multiple revenue streams beyond traditional pawn lending.

However, prospective customers should understand that pawn loans are inherently short-term and typically carry interest rates substantially higher than traditional bank loans. While pawn lending is non-recourse (meaning the lender cannot pursue borrowers legally if they fail to reclaim pawned items), it is a collateral-based loan requiring the surrender of valuable personal property. FirstCash, as a for-profit publicly traded company, operates under standard pawn industry economics where the business model depends on customer default or the sale of unclaimed merchandise.
pros: Massive national and international presence with 3,300+ locations providing convenient access to pawn services
Fast cash on the spot for pawn loans secured by personal property—no credit check required
Buys and sells diverse merchandise categories including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and instruments
Non-recourse pawn loans—borrowers cannot be pursued legally if they default, only lose pledged items
Publicly traded company (S&P 400 MidCap, Russell 2000) with standardized operations and transparency
Layaway service with affordable 10% down payment option for retail purchases
Gold and precious metal buying service providing immediate cash for items most consumers have at home
cons: Pawn loan interest rates are significantly higher than traditional bank loans, making this an expensive form of borrowing
Borrowers must surrender valuable personal property as collateral, with no guarantee of retrieval if unable to repay
Limited to non-recourse lending; customers lose pledged items if they cannot repay, creating financial loss beyond typical loan default
As a for-profit entity, FirstCash's business model depends on customer default and sale of unredeemed merchandise
Pawn loans are short-term solutions and do not help build credit history
best_for: Consumers who need immediate cash and have valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools) to pledge as collateral
Individuals with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
People seeking a short-term bridge loan without the long-term commitment of bank debt
Shoppers looking for discounted used merchandise or those interested in layaway purchase plans
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-strapped consumers without access to traditional credit who have valuable personal property to pledge for immediate short-term loans. The critical caveat is that pawn loans carry significantly higher costs than bank loans, require surrendering collateral, and offer no credit-building benefit—making them a last-resort borrowing option rather than a long-term financial solution.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying
Layaway purchase plans with 10% down payment
Store locator tool for finding nearby locations
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Point-of-sale payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
